# Project Leadership — Prompts

Prompt collection for **Project Leadership**.

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |
| ----- | --- | -------- | ---------- |
| [Benchmarking Data Search](../../_canonical/benchmarking-data-search.md) | Cross-App | Find historical cost data for benchmarking new estimates. Requires validation for current applicability. | intermediate |
| [Budget Meeting Preparation](../../_canonical/budget-meeting-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Enter budget reviews prepared with full context on recent cost discussions and concerns. | intermediate |
| [Change Order History](../../_canonical/change-order-history.md) | Cross-App | Track informal change order discussions and ensure they are captured in formal systems. | intermediate |
| [Client Communication Draft - PM](../../_canonical/client-communication-draft-pm.md) | Outlook | Draft client communications quickly while ensuring all relevant information is captured and tone is appropriate. | intermediate |
| [Cost Variance Narrative](../../_canonical/cost-variance-narrative.md) | Cross-App | Draft variance explanations based on team discussions. Numbers must always come from official cost systems. | intermediate |
| [Decision Context Research](../../_canonical/decision-context-research.md) | Cross-App | Gather comprehensive context before making important decisions without scheduling multiple briefing meetings. | intermediate |
| [Decision Log Research](../../_canonical/decision-log-research.md) | Cross-App | Reconstruct decision history from communications when formal records are incomplete or need verification. | intermediate |
| [Executive Communication Draft](../../_canonical/executive-communication-draft.md) | Cross-App | Quickly draft executive communications while maintaining appropriate tone and completeness. | intermediate |
| [Invoice Dispute Research](../../_canonical/invoice-dispute-research.md) | Cross-App | Gather invoice dispute history before vendor reconciliation meetings. | intermediate |
| [Leadership Meeting Preparation](../../_canonical/leadership-meeting-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Walk into leadership meetings fully prepared with context on all likely discussion topics and pending decisions. | intermediate |
| [Lessons Learned Discovery - PM](../../_canonical/lessons-learned-discovery-pm.md) | Cross-App | Jumpstart lessons learned by identifying patterns from project communications. Requires team validation. | intermediate |
| [Organizational Pulse Check](../../_canonical/organizational-pulse-check.md) | Cross-App | Get informal visibility into organizational sentiment. Always supplement with formal feedback mechanisms. | intermediate |
| [Portfolio Overview](../../_canonical/portfolio-overview.md) | Cross-App | Get a quick pulse on your portfolio without reading dozens of individual project updates. | intermediate |
| [Risk and Issue Surfacing](../../_canonical/risk-and-issue-surfacing.md) | Cross-App | Proactively surface risks and issues from team communications before they escalate. | intermediate |
| [Stakeholder Meeting Prep - PM](../../_canonical/stakeholder-meeting-prep-pm.md) | Cross-App | Enter stakeholder meetings prepared to address their specific concerns and highlight relevant achievements. | intermediate |
| [Stakeholder Meeting Preparation](../../_canonical/stakeholder-meeting-preparation.md) | Cross-App | Prepare for important stakeholder meetings with full context on the relationship history and open items. | intermediate |
| [Weekly Status Synthesis](../../_canonical/weekly-status-synthesis.md) | Cross-App | Synthesize a week of scattered communications into a coherent status report. Use weekly before stakeholder reporting. | intermediate |
